package rulecoverage

func PositiveConstantEncryptionKey() string {
    ruleID := "constant_encryption_key"
    family := "security"
    severity := "error"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`[]byte(\"...\")` used directly as arguments to `cipher.NewGCM`, `aes.NewCipher`, or similar encryption constructor calls"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
